description: Periodically hex an area near the Siphoner's target, slowing enemy movement and attack speed.
tooltipTemplate: While in combat, every {cooldownSeconds:1}s the Siphoner automatically hexes enemies within {radius:0} of its current foe. Hexed enemies move at {moveSpeedMultiplier%} speed and attack at {attackSpeedMultiplier%} speed for {durationSeconds:1}s. Costs {manaCost:0} mana per pulse.

description: Periodically mark an area near the Siphoner's target, exposing enemies to armor loss and reduced healing.
tooltipTemplate: While in combat, every {cooldownSeconds:1}s the Siphoner automatically marks enemies within {radius:0} of its current foe. Marked enemies lose {armorReduction:0} armor and receive {healingReceivedMultiplier%} of incoming healing for {durationSeconds:1}s. Costs {manaCost:0} mana per pulse.

description: Siphon Life deals more damage and generates more healing.
tooltipTemplate: Siphon Life deals {damageMultiplier+%} damage and produces {healingMultiplier+%} healing.

description: Channeling Siphon Life weakens the target, reducing its outgoing damage.
tooltipTemplate: Every {secondsPerStack:1}s of continuous Siphon Life applies a stack of Withering ({damageReductionPerStack%} less damage dealt per stack, up to {maxStacks:0} stacks). Stacks linger {lingerSeconds:1}s after the beam breaks.
